scripts.install:python: pip3 install --break-system-packages -r scripts/requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || pip3 install -r scripts/requirements.txt
scripts.install:doc-service: pip3 install --break-system-packages -r doc-service/requirements.txt 2>/dev/null || pip3 install -r doc-service/requirements.txt
scripts.install:all: cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install && cd .. && npm run install:python && npm run install:doc-service
scripts.build: cd client && npm install && npm run build
scripts.deploy: npm run install:python && npm run install:doc-service && npm run build && npm start
